programmes.show_description: Bursting the Bubble: As the team launches high-powered rockets into the sky on Skinwalker Ranch, they are frozen in shock by what they encounter. (S6, ep 4)
The Mystery Of Puma Punku: Experts explore the puzzling construction of Puma Punku in Bolivia. Could advanced technology have been used to carve the ancient temple complex? (S1, ep 7)
The Power of the Talisman: For millennia, people have believed that everyday objects can possess hidden energy. These talismans are seen to provide protection and good fortune. (S15, ep 20)
This July, 75 years have passed since the Roswell incident. This two-part documentary revisits the alleged crash of an extra terrestrial craft at Roswell, New Mexico in 1947. (1 of 2)
Cousin Competition: When Les takes his niece Karen under his wing to help out at the jewellery counter, Ashley doesn't hide her jealousy well. (S12, ep 2)
Gold Vs Gold: Seth thinks Les is stuck in the past after hand delivering their gold to a refinery - and bets his dad that his new mail order service will improve things. (S12, ep 3)
Karen Vs Ashley: Tensions between Karen and Ashley explode on the sales floor so Les puts them both in the doghouse. (S12, ep 4)
Join antiques expert and presenter David Dickinson as more collectors try to sell their items to dealers. Will they strike a deal or take a chance at auction instead? (S9, ep 44)
Wolverhampton 1: David Dickinson is joined by a team of antique dealers. Will Debbie pay over the odds for some royal Doulton figurines? (S10, ep 24)
Samurai, Stones and Skateboards: Chum brings out his inner warrior when a Japanese samurai mask hits the counter and a Norman Rockwell autograph comes into the shop. (S24, ep 14)
...Henry's Wreck-trospective. Dive headfirst into the archives to celebrate the very best bits from the hit series Junk & Disorderly. (S1, ep 5)
Bowling For Brandi: Darrell and Brandon are thrilled to return to their lucky town of West Covina. However, it's Dave that makes a first-class find. (S7, ep 4)
Bid Strong and Prosper: Dan Dotson returns to the auctions in Costa Mesa, California, where the buyers have their sights set on Dave Hester on his home turf. (S7, ep 8)
Sin City Sucker Punch: An old rivalry resurfaces in Vegas, before a locker reveals a covered item that's thought to be a vintage car - but will the buyer drive away happy? (S2, ep 8)
Now You See It, Now You Don't: A mega-find leaves the winning bidder scratching his head - but when the item's true nature is revealed, he'll be swimming in more than just cash. (S2, ep 9)
Matt Attack: Manic Matt sets out to prove a point in the port of Oakland, gambling early on a container full of liquor before driving up prices. Will his tactics backfire? (S1, ep 2)
Episode 3: New auctioneer Penny has Israeli young guns Uzi and Schlomi seeing red. (S1, ep 3)
A local man in Nashville is investigating a weird smell when suddenly the sidewalk explodes into flames, throwing a manhole cover across the street. (S4, ep 1)
Cameras capture footage of millions of strange creatures invading a church and some wonder if it's evidence of a grisly buried secret. (S4, ep 4)
Cameras capture footage of a motorway swarmed with snake-like creatures, with the latest tech revealing where they came from and their top-secret purpose. (S4, ep 6)
When cameras capture footage of a massive, never-before-seen sea creature in mysterious waters near Japan, some experts wonder if it's an undiscovered underwater monster. (S4, ep 7)
When cameras capture footage of a strange, blob-like alien in the Amazon jungle, some experts suspect that the origins of this monster are stranger-than-fiction. (S4, ep 8)

programmes.show_name: The Jesus Strand: A Search For DNA
programmes.show_description: Using the latest technology and access to the Vatican's archives, this programme creates the most detailed family tree yet in the search of Jesus Christ's descendants.
Sin City Sucker Punch: An old rivalry resurfaces in Vegas, before a locker reveals a covered item that's thought to be a vintage car - but will the buyer drive away happy? (S2, ep 8)
Now You See It, Now You Don't: A mega-find leaves the winning bidder scratching his head - but when the item's true nature is revealed, he'll be swimming in more than just cash. (S2, ep 9)
Bowling For Brandi: Darrell and Brandon are thrilled to return to their lucky town of West Covina. However, it's Dave that makes a first-class find. (S7, ep 4)
Bid Strong and Prosper: Dan Dotson returns to the auctions in Costa Mesa, California, where the buyers have their sights set on Dave Hester on his home turf. (S7, ep 8)
Wolverhampton 2: The dealers come across a music box, and some letters from former prime ministers Edward Heath and Harold Macmillan land on Stewart Hogfather's table. (S10, ep 25)
Attack of the Semi: Tempers flare when a dump truck driver clashes with an angry motorist over an exhaust, turning a minor dispute into a heated standoff. (S1, ep 11)
Highway Robbery: Road rage escalates as a Pennsylvania taxi driver faces a gunman and a Texas motorist threatens others with an axe. (S1, ep 12)
A mysterious entity is spotted in the Irish countryside. A séance goes violently wrong and a UFO pays an overnight visit to the city that never sleeps. (S8, ep 1)
Children across North America interact with ghosts that their parents can't see and citizens in China fear the worst as hundreds of orbs swarm in the moonlight. (S8, ep 2)
Harrowing Hauntings: Dark spirits plunge their victims into a sinister supernatural realm, while a malicious entity stalks a young girl. (S1, ep 6)
The Founding of America: Giorgio Tsoukalos investigates whether alien encounters influenced the establishing acts of the Founding Fathers as he travels to Washington DC. (S1, ep 8)
The Top Ten Scariest Encounters: From a meeting in Texas that left onlookers with mysterious injuries to strange cattle mutilations, discover history's terrifying encounters. (S16, ep 4)
This July, 75 years have passed since the Roswell incident. This two-part documentary revisits the alleged crash of an extra terrestrial craft at Roswell, New Mexico in 1947. (2 of 2)
Buy Baby Buy: Les goes on a buying spree that leaves his staff wondering what's going on. Meanwhile, Karen needs Byron's help to handle a pair of unruly piano players. (S12, ep 5)
Shakedown!: A hustler tries to make Les an offer he can't refuse, but the Golds fight back and turn the tables on the shady customer. (S12, ep 6)
Along Came a Spider: Ashley pranks Seth to teach him a lesson about locking his door, but Seth evens the score with a practical joke of his own. (S12, ep 7)
Join antiques expert and presenter David Dickinson as more collectors try to sell their items to dealers. Will they strike a deal or take a chance at auction instead? (S9, ep 45)
Who Needs A Captain: Pinwheel leads as the fleet's mates prove their worth. Will they be able to keep their streak or will one of the other crews take the crown? (S6, ep 4)
Ego Has Landed: The Dave is desperate to redeem himself. Paul doubles down on his efforts to train his rookie mate. Pinwheel strives to regain the top spot. (S6, ep 5)
Gators and Ghost Towns: As Troy, Chase and Bill mount an airboat to hunt an area where pythons are raiding alligator nests, an unfortunate error could leave them stranded. (S2, ep 4)
Outlaw Country: Troy, Chase, and Bill gamble on a long journey into the centre of the Everglades, while Bruce and Zak head deep into outlaw country on the hunt for hidden snakes. (S2, ep 5)
Python Gamble: When the swampers can't agree on a hunting ground, they make a friendly wager on which team can catch the most snakes and the biggest python. (S2, ep 6)
Top ten Unexplained Technology: Explore 10 astonishing, unexplained technologies: from golden orbs in Mexico to a sacred box said to speak with the heavens. (S17, ep 5)
UFO Over the Andes, the Ohio Grassman, and Ancient Horn Mystery: Did a Chilean family photograph a real UFO over the Andes? And does a huge fossil point to a prehistoric figure? (S4, ep 2)
Men in Black Calls, Old Kentucky Aliens, and Mysterious Eclipse: What is the identity of a bizarre creature spotted on a driveway? And did the Men in Black threaten a man? (S4, ep 3)
Mystery Bird Monster, Ancient Alien Satellite and Behemoth of the Sea Bottom: Explore a strange creature caught on camera and a sound so loud it covered the Equatorial Pacific. (S4, ep 6)
Teen Ufo, Flying Dinosaur Over Idaho, and Headless Goats: Ony investigates anomalies including UFO footage from Sweden and a bizarre case of decapitated goats in Atlanta. (S4, ep 12)
Swamp Beast Sighting, Martian Conspiracy and Transparent Mexican Sea Monster: Did a canoer film the legendary Skunk Ape walking in gator-infested waters? (S4, ep 13)
Of Biblical Proportions: For thousands of years, humans have shaped awe-inspiring structures as testaments of faith. From the Vatican to Egypt, explore the mysteries they hold. (S2, ep 7)
Lost Sites: Archaeologists have long searched for legendary sites of holy births, miracles and wars. We uncover the stories and efforts to find these sacred places. (S2, ep 10)
The Secrets of the Devil's Bible: A full-page illustration of the Devil and hellish rumours gave the Devil's Bible its nickname, but who really wrote this book? (S7, ep 2)
The Quest to Find the Tomb of Mary Magdalene: Experts look to uncover the truth behind the mystery of Mary Magdalene's life after witnessing the resurrection. (S7, ep 3)
The Mysteries of the World's Oldest Temple: The rock-hewn pillars of Gobekli Tepe in Turkey have baffled archaeologists for decades - who built this incredible monument, and why? (S7, ep 4)
Sacred strongholds: Some strongholds were built to protect the sacred and others used for sinister purposes. Uncovering stories behind the world's most imposing structures. (S2, ep 2)
The Art and War: After thriving for three centuries, the Celts turned from traders into proven warriors, weapon masters and metal artists in a time that became their golden age. (2 of 3)
A local man in Nashville is investigating a weird smell when suddenly the sidewalk explodes into flames, throwing a manhole cover across the street. (S4, ep 1)
